Event: Tavern of Fortune - July 2026
Event Date: 08/07/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AM356
Rule Keeper Amulet

Once in a while, the unit removes all burning, incineration, freezing, and stiffening effects from self and all allies in a small radius around it, restores 400000 health to the targets, and resurrects a random allied unit with 25% health.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
